lanes.summary: Canonical workflow contracts, generated command and skill surfaces, adapters, validation, and release evidence.
nova-plugin remains the only production plugin and the stable public installation path for the 3.x line.
Build and verify immutable release candidates before promoting identical artifacts to stable releases.
Versioned static, simulation, and live evaluation with evidence-derived compatibility claims.
Extract generic schemas and compiler code without moving the nova-plugin public path.
Requires at least two independently maintained production plugin specifications and demonstrated release pressure.
Generated Markdown catalogs remain sufficient until public demand and an approved hosting model exist.
Capability packs remain documentation and routing guidance, not dynamically loaded runtime modules.
Domain variation remains in packs and consumer profiles unless repeated evidence proves new workflow surfaces are necessary.
